concepts.title: Riemann surfaces as 1D complex manifolds
concepts.blurb: Complex one-manifolds support holomorphic charts and conformal geometry.

concepts.title: Branched covers and maps
concepts.blurb: Holomorphic maps behave like branched coverings with controlled ramification.

concepts.title: Riemann–Hurwitz and uniformization
concepts.blurb: Genus, ramification, and universal covering classify compact Riemann surfaces.

concepts.title: Genus as the universal invariant
concepts.blurb: The genus g of a compact Riemann surface controls Euler characteristic χ=2−2g, Betti numbers, and — via Riemann–Hurwitz — the only way branched covers can fit together.

concepts.title: Divisors and the Riemann–Roch theorem
concepts.blurb: Riemann–Roch computes ℓ(D)−ℓ(K−D)=deg D−g+1, turning topology into dimensions of spaces of meromorphic functions and linking divisors to line bundles.
